campaign.headline: Play and win a surprise discount
campaign.rewardPromise: Try your luck and win rewards from this shop.
campaign.dmToClaim: DM us to claim your prize
campaign.noPrizeFooter: Nothing to claim this round — better luck next time.

landing.featuredProductsSubtitle: Tap a product to order or message us—we reply fast.
landing.gamesIntro: Play for a surprise reward, then browse below and message us with what you want.
landing.contactIntro: Choose what works for you—we are happy to help with sizes, custom orders, or game prizes.

wheel.title: Spin to Win!
wheel.subtitle: Try your luck and win amazing prizes
wheel.comeBackIn: Come back in {{hours}} {{hoursText}} to play again. 💕
wheel.alreadyTried: You already tried! Screenshot & DM us 💕
wheel.thanksParticipating: You've already played! Thanks for participating.
wheel.noWinMessage: Don't give up! Try again next time. 💪

tapHearts.title: Catch the Prize
tapHearts.subtitle: Tap falling items to score—avoid bombs!

catchPrize.title: Catch the Prize
catchPrize.instruction: Tap falling items to score points and stay in the flow. When time runs out, your prize is picked at random from what the shop configured—not from your score.

reward.noReward: Try again for a reward next time!

runner.title: Twirla Run
runner.instruction: Tap or press space to jump
runner.rewardHint: When you crash, your result is picked at random from what the shop set up (discount, nothing, etc.)—not from your score.

memoryMatch.title: Memory game
memoryMatch.subtitle: Flip two cards at a time to find all pairs.
memoryMatch.instruction: Flip two cards at a time. When two match, they stay face up. Find every pair to unlock your reward. Each two-card attempt counts as one move; two cards that do not match count as one mistake.
memoryMatch.ruleMaxMistakes: If you reach {{max}} wrong pairs, the round ends.
memoryMatch.ruleMoves: Try to finish with as few moves and mistakes as possible.
memoryMatch.loseTime: Time ran out before you matched every pair.
memoryMatch.loseMistakes: Too many wrong pairs — take a breath and try again.

experience.loadFailedHint: Check the link or try one of the demo games below.

campaignSetup.title: Campaign landing setup
campaignSetup.accessLead: Enter the access code you received from Twirla. If it is correct, you will be taken to the setup form.
campaignSetup.accessNotConfigured: The API is not configured for campaign setup. The host must set TWIRLA_CAMPAIGN_SETUP_ACCESS_CODE (or CampaignSetup:AccessCode) on the Twirla backend.
campaignSetup.lead: Defaults come from the demo shop row in shops.json. Save stores a draft in this browser; open the preview to see your landing. Set play links below so game buttons point at the right shop and experience id.
campaignSetup.noShopsJson: Could not load shops.json. Check that the file is available and try again.
campaignSetup.playLinksHint: These become paths like /wheel/{slug}/{id}. Use your real shop slug from shops.json and the experience id customers should open.
campaignSetup.headline: Campaign headline (optional)
campaignSetup.headlinePlaceholder: Leave blank to use default headline
campaignSetup.productsHint: Add one row per product. Leave a row title empty to skip it.
campaignSetup.oneGameRequired: Leave at least one game enabled on the landing.
campaignSetup.gamesHint: Uncheck games you do not want on the public campaign page. Each game still needs its block in shops.json for that shop to run.
campaignSetup.saveSuccess: Saved. Your links are shown below.
campaignSetup.saveSummaryLead: Share the landing URL with customers. Game buttons use the path id below.
campaignSetup.saveFieldGamePathId: Game URL path id (slug and experience id, e.g. demo-main)
campaignSetup.saveFieldTwirlaShopId: Twirla shop id in shops.json (for the slug you entered)
campaignSetup.saveFieldTwirlaShopIdHint: This is the shopId field for your game configuration row.
campaignSetup.saveFieldTwirlaShopIdUnknown: No enabled shop row matches that slug in shops.json yet—add one or fix the slug under Play links.
